theme_and_archetype.reasoning: A minimalist, white-background conversational AI requires clarity, high legibility, and objective authority. We adapted the Swiss & High-Contrast archetype for the food domain by using an extreme monochrome base (pure white and obsidian) complemented by a single appetizing accent color (Terracotta) used strictly for functional interaction. This prevents the UI from feeling cold, keeping the focus entirely on the food and conversation.

global_design_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Combine editorial magazine typography with standard chat UX.
Content is King: The conversation and the food images are the only things that matter. Strip away decorative borders.
Extreme Contrast: Use pure whites, deep blacks, and radical typography weight shifts (Black vs Light).
Negative Space: Generous paddings to let the UI breathe, mimicking an art gallery presentation for food.
No HTML/CSS: Strictly React Native StyleSheet.create() compliant values.

font_family.strategy: Since React Native relies on system fonts for zero-config setups, we emulate the 'Swiss Brutalist' strategy using system fonts with radical weight contrast. Use '300' (Light) for elegance and '800'/'900' (Black) for impact.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Mobile-first, generous breathing room. Avoid claustrophobic chat bubbles.

motion_and_interactions.principles: Micro-interactions must feel effortless and native. No excessive bounciness.
motion_and_interactions.chat_messages: Messages should slide up and fade in softly when appearing.
motion_and_interactions.screen_transitions: Use native stack screen transitions (slide from right).

accessibility.touch_targets: All clickable elements must be at least 48x48 points.
accessibility.contrast: Text contrast ratio meets WCAG AA standards minimum (e.g. #737373 on #FFFFFF is 4.5:1).
accessibility.screen_reader: All images must have accessibilityLabel. Interactive elements must have accessibilityRole defined.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include testID attributes (e.g., testID='send-message-button').

onboarding_hero.description: Dimly lit minimalist restaurant table setting

menu_placeholders.description: Minimalist white plate with fork and knife

restaurant_ambience.description: Stylish cozy modern cafe interior with ambient lighting
Modern cafe interior with desserts showcase

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use React Native's StyleSheet API. Do not use Tailwind, Shadcn, or HTML elements.
Implement the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' archetype: mostly pure white backgrounds, jet black text/bubbles, and E05A33 (Terracotta) strictly for main actions like the send button.
For typography, use system fonts but enforce strict weight contrasts as defined in the 'typography' scales. E.g., Headers must be heavy (700-800) and tightly tracked, body text legible.
Chat screen must be thumb-friendly: input area at the bottom, auto-growing text input.
Menu Page should use vertical list of cards with high-quality images. Do NOT rely on placeholder services. Use the media_assets URLs provided above.
All interactive elements MUST have a testID prop for testing purposes.
Add 'activeOpacity={0.7}' to all Touchables for native-feeling feedback.
Implement language toggling globally to satisfy both Karakalpak and Russian requirements.
Use strict padding limits defined in 'spacing_and_layout' (24px screen padding).
